top3.sql:
WITH paul_races AS (
    SELECT r.raceId, r.name AS race_name, r.round, res.fastestLapSpeed
    FROM results res
    JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
    JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
    WHERE d.forename = 'Paul' AND d.surname = 'di Resta'
      AND res.fastestLapSpeed IS NOT NULL
),
race_853 AS (
    SELECT fastestLapSpeed
    FROM paul_races
    WHERE round = 853
),
next_race AS (
    SELECT fastestLapSpeed
    FROM paul_races
    WHERE round = 854
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
     ...
